title: Restricted Attribute
description: Personal data categories that may be restricted from use in audience targeting. Combines GDPR Article 9 special categories with US civil-rights protected classes (FHA familial_status, ADEA age). Used in two places: (1) on campaign plans via restricted_attributes to declare which categories are prohibited, and (2) on signal-definition.json via restricted_attributes to declare which categories a signal touches. Governance agents match plan restrictions against signal declarations for structural validation.

enumDescriptions.racial_ethnic_origin: Race or ethnic origin. GDPR Article 9(1), US FHA/ECOA/EEOC protected class.
enumDescriptions.political_opinions: Political opinions or affiliations. GDPR Article 9(1). EU DSA Article 26 prohibits targeting on this category.
enumDescriptions.religious_beliefs: Religious or philosophical beliefs. GDPR Article 9(1), US FHA/EEOC protected class.
enumDescriptions.health_data: Health status, medical conditions, disability. GDPR Article 9(1), US ADA protected class. Includes inferred health data from behavioral signals.
enumDescriptions.sex_life_sexual_orientation: Sex life or sexual orientation. GDPR Article 9(1).
enumDescriptions.genetic_data: Genetic data. GDPR Article 9(1), US GINA.
enumDescriptions.biometric_data: Biometric data used for identification. GDPR Article 9(1).
enumDescriptions.age: A person's age or age range. US ADEA (40+) for employment, US FHA for housing, EU AVMSD for content-directed targeting. Restricted for regulated verticals.
enumDescriptions.familial_status: Whether a household includes children under 18, a pregnant person, or a person seeking custody of a minor. US FHA protected class.
